Package index

All functions

add_area()
Add area
add_centroids_coords()
Add centroid coordinates
add_length()
Add length
aggregate_geom()
Aggregate vector data using a grid
aggregate_geom_categ()
Aggregate geometries by category
aggregate_raster()
Aggregate raster data
aggregate_vector()
Aggregate vector data
clean_names()
Clean the names in a data.frame
get_center()
Get center coordinates
get_geom_colname()
Get the geometry column name
get_max()
Get maximum coordinates
get_min()
Get minimum coordinates
grid_helper()
Build a vector from the origin approximating the minimum and maximum values
is_grid_na()
Are grid attributes NAs?
listnames2dataframes()
Add the list's names to the data frames in the list
make_grid() make_grid_min_max_cells() make_grid_origin_dist() make_grid_origin_res()
Build a grid that can be used later for aggregating geographic data
merge_data_frames()
Merge a list of data frames
simplify_geoms()
Simplify geometries
